rationale: The cited JMR multimedia editorial appears only as a supporting reference in a grouped citation (with Chaiken and Eagly 1983) for a general background point about attention to narrator versus message. The citing paper does not adopt a specific framework, construct operationalization, method, or hypothesis from that editorial. Its core theorizing and empirical tests of the voice numerosity effect proceed independently, with no distinct follow-on use of the cited paper beyond contextual positioning.
